children.heading: Applicability of subsection
children.label: 1 Applicability of subsection
children.text: This subsection applies to additional duties assessed under subsection (b).

children.label: A
children.text: the column 1 general rate of duty that would, at the time the additional duty is imposed under subsection (b), apply to a good classifiable in the same 8-digit subheading of the HTS as the safeguard good; or

children.label: B
children.text: the column 1 general rate of duty that would, on the day before the date on which the Agreement enters into force, apply to a good classifiable in the same 8-digit subheading of the HTS as the safeguard good.

children.heading: Schedule rate of duty
children.label: 3 Schedule rate of duty
children.text: For purposes of subsection (b), the term “schedule rate of duty” means, with respect to a safeguard good, the rate of duty for that good that is set out in the Schedule of the United States to Annex 3.3 of the Agreement.

children.label: A
children.text: that is included in the Schedule of the United States to Annex 3.15 of the Agreement;

children.label: B
children.text: that qualifies as an originating good under , except that operations performed in or material obtained from the United States shall be considered as if the operations were performed in, and the material was obtained from, a country that is not a party to the Agreement; andsection 4033 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: for which a claim for preferential tariff treatment under the Agreement has been made.

children.label: A
children.text: part A of subchapter III of this chapter; or

children.label: B
children.text: chapter 1 of title II of the Trade Act of 1974 ( et seq.).19 U.S.C. 2251

children.heading: Termination
children.label: 6 Termination
children.text: The assessment of an additional duty on a good under subsection (b) shall cease to apply to that good on the date on which duty-free treatment must be provided to that good under the Schedule of the United States to Annex 3.3 of the Agreement.

children.heading: Notice
children.label: 7 Notice
children.text: Not later than 60 days after the Secretary of the Treasury first assesses an additional duty in a calendar year on a good under subsection (b), the Secretary shall notify the country whose good is subject to the additional duty in writing of such action and shall provide to that country data supporting the assessment of the additional duty.

children.heading: Additional duties on safeguard goods
children.label: b Additional duties on safeguard goods

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In addition to any duty proclaimed under subsection (a) or (b) of , and subject to subsection (a), the Secretary of the Treasury shall assess a duty, in the amount determined under paragraph (2), on a safeguard good of a CAFTA–DR country imported into the United States in a calendar year if the Secretary determines that, prior to such importation, the total volume of that safeguard good of such country that is imported into the United States in that calendar year exceeds 130 percent of the volume that is set out for that safeguard good in the corresponding year in the table for that country contained in Appendix I of the General Notes to the Schedule of the United States to Annex 3.3 of the Agreement. For purposes of this subsection, year 1 in that table corresponds to the calendar year in which the Agreement enters into force.section 4031 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: in years 1 through 5, an amount equal to 100 percent of the excess of the applicable NTR (MFN) rate of duty over the schedule rate of duty;

children.label: ii
children.text: in years 6 through 10, an amount equal to 75 percent of the excess of the applicable NTR (MFN) rate of duty over the schedule rate of duty; and

children.label: iii
children.text: in years 11 through 14, an amount equal to 50 percent of the excess of the applicable NTR (MFN) rate of duty over the schedule rate of duty; and

children.label: i
children.text: in years 1 through 14, an amount equal to 100 percent of the excess of the applicable NTR (MFN) rate of duty over the schedule rate of duty;

children.label: ii
children.text: in years 15 through 17, an amount equal to 75 percent of the excess of the applicable NTR (MFN) rate of duty over the schedule rate of duty; and

children.label: iii
children.text: in years 18 and 19, an amount equal to 50 percent of the excess of the applicable NTR (MFN) rate of duty over the schedule rate of duty.
